source.redaction_notes: Synthetic Pagila schema; no real customer data

input.sql:
SET work_mem = '256kB';
SELECT COUNT(*)
FROM rental r
JOIN payment p ON r.rental_id = p.rental_id
JOIN customer c ON r.customer_id = c.customer_id
JOIN staff s ON r.staff_id = s.staff_id;
RESET work_mem
